title: EY - Junior de IT
description:
**Sobre EY**
  

  

 EY es una firma global líder que ofrece servicios de Auditoría, Consultoría, Estrategia y Transacciones e Impuestos, con una red integrada de alrededor de 400\.000 profesionales en 150 países del mundo.
   

  

 Nuestro propósito es construir un mundo mejor de negocios para nuestra gente, para nuestros clientes y para nuestras comunidades. Trabajamos continuamente para mejorar la calidad de nuestros servicios, invirtiendo en nuestra gente y en innovación. Las oportunidades de crecer, tener éxito y desarrollarse en EY son ilimitadas.
   

  

 EY cree en la igualdad de oportunidades y no discrimina por motivos de género, edad, estado civil, credo, identidad de género, orientación sexual, origen étnico u origen nacional, discapacidad o características físicas.
   

  

 Todas nuestras oportunidades de trabajo están abiertas a personas con discapacidad y buscamos alentar a que se postulen para nuestras diferentes posiciones.  En caso de necesitar algún ajuste razonable o apoyo, por favor no dejes de aclararlo en tu postulación.
   

  

  

  

**¿Qué oportunidades ofrecemos para tu carrera en tecnología?**
 Buscamos estudiantes y/o graduadas/os de carreras como Licenciatura en Sistemas, Ingeniería en Informática o afines para que se sumen a nuestros equipos.
   

  

 Durante todo el 2025 incorporaremos talentos en posiciones Junior para diferentes áreas, por lo que te proponemos que te postules incorporando tu CV para que podamos contactarte en caso de tener vacantes que se ajusten a tu perfil. Contamos con posiciones para prácticas rentadas, como así también a largo plazo, en relación de dependencia.
   

  

**Los equipos en los cuales sumamos personas son los siguientes:**
* Technology Risk
* Ciberseguridad
* Procesos IT
* SAP
* RPA
* Data \& IA Engineering
* Tecnología Forense
* Desarrollo backend


**Requisitos**
* Estudiantes o graduados/as de carreras universitarias como Informática, Sistemas o afines.
* Disponibilidad para trabajar full time.
* No es necesario contar con experiencia laboral previa.
* Inglés intermedio/avanzado (no excluyente).
* Flexibilidad y adaptación para el trabajo en equipo, la innovación y el aprendizaje.


  

  

**¿Qué te ofrecemos?**
* 
+ 
- Formar parte de una de las mejores empresas para trabajar (GPTW Argentina).
- Formar parte de un equipo de trabajo altamente reconocido en el mercado y basado en las mejores prácticas.
- Modalidad de trabajo \#híbrido.
- Cobertura médica privada para vos y tu grupo familiar.
- Monto adicional mensual por conectividad/trabajo remoto.
- Descuentos en importante red de gimnasios, comercios y universidades.
- Envíos gratis y descuentos en app de delivery.
- Snacks gratuitos en la oficina.
- Revisiones salariales periódicas.
- Programas de capacitación continua presenciales y virtuales.
- Plataforma de entrenamiento virtual con más de 18\.000 cursos disponibles, entre los cuales se encuentran los cursos de Udemy y Coursera.
- Acceso a EY Badges, programa global de certificaciones en diferentes áreas de conocimiento. EY Master in Business Analytics y Master in Sustainability, innovadores programas de aprendizaje virtual en asociación con Hult International Business School.
- Capacitación en idioma inglés: política de clases, open lessons gratuitas, webinars de doble impacto y libre acceso a la plataforma de aprendizaje virtual.
- Ayuda económica para quienes se mudan a Buenos Aires para trabajar en EY.
- Consultorios médicos y nutricionales. Programas anuales de salud.
- Políticas de flexibilidad, licencias especiales y softlanding para personas gestantes.


  

  

 ¡Y mucho más! Si querés ver todo lo que tenemos para vos, hacé clic acá: https://bit.ly/36yXaK4
   

  

 Shape your future with confidence.
   

  

  

  

**Búsqueda Laboral Equitativa.** 
 El empleador solo podrá solicitarle la información estrictamente necesaria para el desempeño en el trabajo que se ofrece. (Ley 6471/21 CABA)
   

  

 EY Selección de Personal
   

  

 (011\) 4875\-4888
   

  

 Luna 49, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires
   

  

 https://www.ey.com/es\_ar/careers/technology
   

  

 Instagram: www.instagram.com/ey.argentina
   

  

 Facebook: www.facebook.com/EYCareersArgentina
   

  

 X: www.x.com/Ey\_CareersAR
   

  

 LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/ernstandyoung
   

  

 YouTube: www.youtube.com/user/ErnstandYoungAR
   

  

  

  

 \#CampusEY
   

  

 \#ShapeTheFutureWithConfidence

title: Customer Support Representative - Pagos Digitales (Amba, Buenos Aires)
description:
****Sobre el rol****
 Desde
 **Workana** 
 buscamos incorporar
 **Customer Support Representatives** 
 para sumarse al equipo de atención al cliente de una
 **empresa de tecnología líder en Latinoamérica** 
 , dentro del área de
 **pagos digitales y transacciones online** 
 .
   

  

 El objetivo del rol es brindar soporte de primer nivel a usuarios y comercios que utilizan la plataforma de pagos, asegurando una atención empática, eficiente y resolutiva.
   

  

****Turnos disponibles****
* Domingo a jueves, de 8 a 17 hs
* Lunes a viernes, de 13 a 22 hs
* Lunes a viernes, de 9 a 18 hs
* Martes a sábado, de 10 a 19 hs


****Responsabilidades****
* Brindar soporte a usuarios por canales digitales (no presencial).
* Resolver consultas vinculadas a medios de pago, acreditaciones y transacciones.
* Escalar casos complejos al equipo correspondiente cuando sea necesario.
* Registrar interacciones y mantener actualizada la información en el sistema de soporte (Zendesk).
* Colaborar activamente con el equipo a través de herramientas internas como Slack.


**Requirements**
* Experiencia mínima de 2 años en atención al cliente digital o soporte técnico, idealmente en empresas fintech, pagos digitales o plataformas de servicios financieros (excluyente).
* Conocimiento comprobable en Zendesk (excluyente).
* Capacidad de organización, priorización y gestión de tickets.
* Excelentes habilidades de redacción y comunicación escrita.
* Buena conexión a internet y manejo de herramientas colaborativas (Slack, Google Workspace, etc.).
* Actitud proactiva, trabajo en equipo y disposición para aprender rápidamente sobre productos financieros.
* Residencia en AMBA (excluyente)


**Modalidad:** 
 Contractor (por proyecto, con renovación mensual)
   

  

**Dedicación:** 
 Full time \- 8 hs diarias
   

  

**Ubicación:** 
 Remoto, con residencia en
 **AMBA (Buenos Aires)**
**Salario :** 
 ARS 1\.000\.000

title: Software Engineer Fullstack
description:
Pedidosya es parte de Delivery Hero, compañía líder mundial en delivery que opera en más de 70 países en todo el mundo. PedidosYa es la compañía de tecnología líder en delivery y quick commerce de Latinoamérica. Es una plataforma simple, rápida y accesible que conecta a una red de millones de personas usuarias, comercios y personas repartidoras a una gran variedad de productos y servicios que ofrece la comunidad. La compañía, que opera en 15 países de Latinoamérica lanzó en 2020 PedidosYa Market, el primer mercado 100% digital que entrega alimentos y artículos para el hogar desde los 10 minutos tras haber realizado el pedido. Delivery Hero cotiza en la Bolsa de Frankfurt desde 2017 y forma parte del índice bursátil MDAX.
   

  

**Descripción del empleo**
 Tenemos una oportunidad para vos, estamos buscando
 **Software Engineer Fullstack** 
 para sumarse al equipo
 **Lending** 
 en la Tribu
 **Payments \& Fintech.**
* Construir interfaces web con React y diseñar backends para frontends, garantizando una experiencia de usuario fluida y escalable.
* Integrar múltiples servicios: Trabajarás en la integración de servicios internos de PedidosYa y globales de Delivery Hero, promoviendo la calidad y el rendimiento.
* Fomentar buenas prácticas de desarrollo.
* Participar activamente en la definición técnica y funcional, aportando una perspectiva de alto valor.
* Contribuir a una cultura de mejora continua.


**Requisitos**
* Manejo avanzado de Node.js (Express, NestJS) y React (hooks, Context API).
* Sólidos conocimientos en JavaScript y TypeScript.
* Conocimiento de Clean Architecture, principios SOLID y diseño de APIs.
* Manejo de bases de datos SQL/NoSQL (MongoDB, DynamoDB) y experiencia con pruebas unitarias y de integración (Jest, Cypress, etc.).
* Experiencia con entornos de cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure), Docker y CI/CD (Jenkins).


**Información adicional**
* Crear valor para un gran ecosistema de negocios, con foco en la persona usuaria, porque somos user centric.
* Jugar en equipo siempre.
* Moverte a la velocidad de tus ideas.
* Aprender, desarrollarte y reinventarte.
* Generar impacto positivo en las personas y el planeta.
* Trabajar en \#ModoPeYa: nuestra manera de trabajar focalizada en la flexibilidad y orientada a lograr un buen balance dentro y fuera de la oficina.


 La diversidad de talento potencia nuestra Cooltura y nuestra organización. Jugamos en equipo en todo lo que hacemos, y lo que más nos gusta de eso es que promovemos la creación de equipos diversos e inclusivos que puedan aportar diferentes perspectivas a PedidosYa. Nuestras oportunidades laborales están abiertas a todas las personas, independientemente de su identidad de género, orientación sexual, origen étnico, religión, edad, discapacidad y/o otras características individuales.
   

  

 En caso de necesitar algún ajuste razonable o accesibilidad particular para tener la entrevista, por favor no dejes de aclararlo en tu postulación. Además, siéntete libre de indicarnos tus pronombres (él/ella/elle) desde el primer contacto.
   

  

 \#CoolturaPeYa \#LaDiversidadNosPotencia

title: Frontend Software Engineer
description:
This is a
 **full\-time, remote position based in Brazil** 
 .
   

  

 🚀 About the Job
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **Frontend Software Engineer** 
 to join our client’s team and help build a
 **world\-class travel platform** 
 that empowers users and partners worldwide.
   

  

 You’ll work as part of a
 **cross\-functional team** 
 of talented engineers, designers, and product managers, developing new features, enhancing existing ones, and ensuring the best possible experience for users and business partners.
   

  

 An ideal candidate is passionate about building high\-quality products, takes ownership of their work, and constantly seeks creative and efficient ways to deliver impactful results. You know when to aim for perfection and when to iterate quickly.
   

  

 Tech Stack
   

  

* Frontend: React \+ TypeScript
* Backend: Scala
* Cloud: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)


 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Design, develop, and review high\-quality code for the web portals.
* Work autonomously while staying aligned with your engineering peers, designers, and product managers.
* Identify and implement engineering improvements to enhance performance and scalability.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with product and other technical teams.
* Contribute to a team culture focused on asynchronous communication and minimal meetings, emphasizing clarity and alignment.


 Requirements:
   

  

* Strong experience and deep understanding of React and TypeScript.
* Proven ability to solve complex problems creatively and thoughtfully.
* Experience working in fast\-paced environments with multiple priorities.
* Ability to handle ambiguity and deliver high\-quality work across different contexts.
* A proactive mindset with ownership over results and continuous improvement.

title: Testing Program Liaison
description:
Founded in \*\*\*\*, Fullscript is a healthcare platform built on the belief that care should treat the whole person.
   

  

 Today, more than 125,000 practitioners and 10 million patients count on us for access to high\-quality supplements, industry\-leading labs, and tools that make it easier to follow through on care.Our purpose is simple: to help people get better.
   

  

 Every system we design and every program we deliver supports practitioners in providing care that is more personal, more efficient, and more effective.This is your invitation.
   

  

 Bring your ideas.
   

  

 Bring your grit.
   

  

 Bring your care for people.Let's build a healthier future together and make healthcare whole.About The RoleFullscript is redefining supplement quality for healthcare professionals and their patients.
   

  

 As part of our Medical Innovation team, the Testing Program Liaison will own the end\-to\-end execution and evolution of Fullscript's clinician\-led supplement testing program — ensuring every product we offer meets the highest scientific and regulatory standards.
   

  

 This program is new and expanding rapidly.
   

  

 We're looking for a technically savvy and scientifically\-minded professional who can bridge the worlds of lab science, regulatory standards, and practitioner education.
   

  

 You'll manage every step of the testing cycle — from product selection and lab coordination to data interpretation and educational content creation — helping us bring transparency and trust to supplement quality.What You'll DoProgram Strategy \& Execution: Own the quarterly supplement testing program from start to finish — including SKU selection, sampling, lab coordination, data interpretation, and results integration.Identify high\-risk or high\-value supplement SKUs using data and industry insights.Develop and maintain testing standards, methodologies, and assay protocols in partnership with accredited labs (e.g., HPLC, GC\-MS, ICP\-MS, microbiological assays).
   

  

 Collaborate with QA, Medical Innovation, and Merchandising teams to resolve any out\-of\-specification results and maintain compliance with GMP and other regulatory standards.Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Engineering, Catalog, and Product teams to ensure test results are accurately integrated into the Fullscript platform and practitioner experience.Work closely with QA, Legal, and Medical teams to define testing guardrails and ensure alignment with regulatory expectations across both the U.S. and Canada.Liaise with vendors, manufacturers, and labs to align on test methods, reporting specifications, and sample handling.Data Interpretation \& Communication: Analyze Certificates of Analysis (CoAs) to extract potency and purity data and translate findings into actionable insights.Develop internal documentation (SOPs, QA summaries, internal briefs) and educational assets for practitioners.Create clear, practitioner\-facing materials — such as slide decks, handouts, FAQs, and "Fullscript Academy" content — that translate scientific data into accessible knowledge for healthcare professionals.Partner with Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success to craft data\-driven messaging and external content that communicates Fullscript's leadership in supplement quality.Continuous Improvement: Keep assay methodologies and lab partnerships up to date with emerging science, technologies, and regulatory changes.Contribute to process optimization, data accuracy, and content workflows that scale as the program expands to new regions (U.S. ? Canada).
   

  

 Provide expert input on new ingredients, contaminants, and testing trends relevant to practitioners and consumers.Annual Testing Cycle management which includes:Active Testing Periods (Quarterly): Manage sample logistics (including Distribution Center visits), lab coordination, method alignment, troubleshooting, and data review.Interim Periods: Conduct program planning, SKU risk assessments, lab method updates, and prepare content and stakeholder communications for the next testing cycle.What You BringBachelor's degree in Biochemistry, Chemistry, or a related life\-science field.2\+ years in an accredited supplement\-testing or analytical lab (HPLC, GC\-MS, ICP\-MS, microbiology, etc.).
   

  

 Strong scientific writing and data\-translation skills.Understanding of supplement quality standards, GMP requirements, and regulatory frameworks in the U.S. and Canada.Bonus if you have:Master's or PhD in Analytical Chemistry or a related discipline.Prior experience in a supplement company, medical affairs, or clinical liaison capacity.Familiarity with digital platforms, data integration systems, or content management tools.Experience creating educational or marketing content for healthcare audiences.Who You AreYou're scientifically curious, operationally strong, and energized by building a new program from the ground up.You can translate complex lab data into clear, credible communications for healthcare professionals.You thrive in cross\-functional environments and enjoy collaborating with scientists, clinicians, engineers, quality and marketers alike.Why You\\'ll Love FullscriptMarket competitive compensation package including equity401K matching (within US) / RRSP matching (within CAD)Flexible PTO policyFlexible benefits package and additional perksEmployee discount on Fullscript catalog of products for family \& friendsAbility to Work Wherever You Work WellApply nowApply now—let's build the future of healthcare, together.
   

  

 We kindly ask that all applications be submitted directly through our careers page.
   

  

 Due to the high volume of interest, we're not able to respond to individual emails or messages about job postings.
   

  

 If your background aligns with what we're looking for, a member of our team will reach out to you directly.Fullscript is an equal\-opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive workplace.
   

  

 Accommodations are available upon request—email \*\*\*\*\*\* for support.Before joining the team, all candidates who receive and accept an offer will complete a background check.We use AI tools to support parts of our hiring process, like screening and reviewing responses.
   

  

 Final decisions are always made by people.
   

  

 This process complies with privacy and employment laws across Canada and the U.S.We are an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion.More infowww.fullscript.comSOCIAL: @fullscriptHQ
   

  

 \#J\-\*\*\*\*\*\-Ljbffr

title: Técnicos de Redes HFC y FTTH
description:
¡Estamos en la búsqueda de Técnicos de campo de Redes HFC y FTTH para incorporar a nuestra empresa de telecomunicaciones!
 



 🛜 En Panatel Communications, somos una compañía líder en el sector de telecomunicaciones, especializada en el diseño, implementación y mantenimiento de redes de alta calidad para brindar soluciones de conectividad a nuestros clientes.
 



 Si tienes interés en formar parte de un equipo dinámico, innovador y en constante crecimiento, ¡te invitamos a postularte!
 



 🕵‍♀️ Descripción del puesto:
 



 🔎 El rol de Técnico de campo de Redes HFC y FTTH contempla tareas de mantenimiento, diagnóstico y reparación de redes de telecomunicaciones.
 



 El candidato seleccionado será responsable de garantizar la óptima operatividad de las redes HFC (Híbrido de Fibra Coaxial) y FTTH (Fibra hasta el hogar) mediante intervenciones correctivas y preventivas.
 



 📑 Responsabilidades:
 



 Realizar mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo de redes HFC y FTTH.
 



 Diagnóstico y solución de incidencias técnicas en las redes de fibra óptica y coaxial.
 



 Medición y verificación de parámetros de redes de telecomunicaciones.
 



 Documentación detallada de las tareas realizadas y elaboración de informes.
 



 Colaboración con el equipo de soporte técnico para resolver problemas complejos.
 



 Cumplimiento de los procedimientos y normas de seguridad establecidas.
 



 📜 Requisitos:
 



 Educación: Título de educación secundaria completa título técnico.
 



  





 🪪Licencia de conducir: Carnet de conducir B1 o superior vigente.
 



  





 Experiencia: No es excluyente contar con experiencia previa en redes, ya que ofrecemos capacitación integral y acompañamiento continuo en el puesto.
 



  





 Actitudes y habilidades: Proactividad, responsabilidad, capacidad para trabajar en equipo y bajo presión, y buen manejo de herramientas de diagnóstico.
 



  





 ✅ Ofrecemos:
 



 Capacitación y formación continua.
 



 Posibilidad de crecimiento y desarrollo dentro de la empresa.
 



 Un ambiente laboral colaborativo y en constante evolución.
 



 Excelente equipo de trabajo y soporte en terreno.
 



 📍 Lugar de trabajo: Buenos Aires, ARGENTINA.
 



 Posiciones disponibles en zona norte, Tortuguitas y Avellaneda.
 



 Si eres una persona apasionada por las telecomunicaciones y estás buscando un desafío profesional, ¡te esperamos!
 



  





 En Panatel Communications tendrás la oportunidad de crecer, aprender y desarrollar tu carrera en una empresa consolidada y con proyección.
 



 ¡Postúlate ahora y sé parte de nuestro equipo!
 



 📧 Manda tu cv: Recursos.humanos@tivity.com.ar o al MD de este mismo medio.

title: Analista de Datos (AWS)
company: BYMA Bolsas y Mercados Argentinos S.A.
description:
📈
 **\#SomosBYMA** 
 ,
 **la Bolsa de Valores líder de Argentina** 
 🇦🇷
 



  





 Trabajamos para transformar la inversión en trabajo y desarrollo, generamos el escenario y los productos para que todos los argentinos puedan canalizar sus ahorros y obtengan un rendimiento que les permita alcanzar sus metas. 🚀

* Conducir análisis complejos, incluyendo segmentaciones, correlaciones, evaluaciones históricas y proyecciones.
* Diseñar y construir dashboards avanzados en herramientas de BI (ej. Power BI).

 . Manejo avanzado de Excel y herramientas de Base de Datos (Access, SQL Server, etc.).
* Inglés avanzado
 *(excluyente)* 
 .



  





  





 🤩
 ***¡Nuestra propuesta de valor potencia tu desarrollo profesional y personal!***




  





 💻
 **Experiencia Flex:** 
 3 días de trabajo remoto y 2 días de presencialidad por semana.
 



 🏖️
 **Vacaciones Flex:** 
 14 días para trabajar online desde donde quieras, antes o después de tus vacaciones.
 



 🌐
 **Reintegro por gastos de conectividad.** 




 🤓
 **\#BYMAEDUCA:** 
 becas para cursos, diplomaturas, carreras de grado y posgrado en universidades líderes.
 



 🍼
 **\#LicenciasExtendidas:** 
 Licencia por maternidad con regreso progresivo y Licencia por paternidad extendida. Sala de Lactancia en BYMA.
 



 🩺
 **\#PrepagaDePrimerNivel:** 
 Cobertura de prepaga para el grupo familiar, seguro de vida y campañas de vacunación.
 



 💪🏻
 **\#GYMPass:** 
 Descuentos en redes de gimnasios.
 



  





  





*¿Qué estás esperando para ser parte de una compañía líder del Mercado de Capitales argentino?* 




  





  





 📌Sumate a nuestra
 **\#CulturaBYMA** 
 que prioriza el bienestar, la igualdad, el desarrollo profesional y la inclusión. ¡Formá parte de un equipo de personas que trabajan por un
 **gran propósito** 
 ! 🎯

title: Technical Support Level2/3
description:
🧑‍💻
 **Technical Support (Level 2/3\) – Argentina Only**
**Our client is looking for** 
 a proactive and tech\-savvy
 **Technical Support Level 2/3** 
 professional to join their global team. This role is with an innovative software and AI resources company that helps organizations build intelligent, customer\-focused support operations.
   

  

 You’ll be the go\-to expert for complex technical issues, working closely with Product and Engineering teams to resolve escalations, improve processes, and enhance the customer experience.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Provide advanced (Level 2/3\) technical support via email, chat, and phone.
* Troubleshoot and analyze HAR files, console logs, SQL queries, and product performance issues.
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to resolve bugs and feature requests.
* Document solutions, update internal knowledge bases, and create customer\-facing resources.
* Manage escalations and ensure clear, proactive communication with customers.


**Requirements**
* Based in Argentina (mandatory)
* Advanced or native English (written \& spoken)
* 3\+ years in Level 2/3 technical support, ideally within a SaaS or software company.
* Hands\-on experience with JIRA Service Management / Atlassian tools.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
* Availability for a full\-time remote role (40 hours/week), working a 6:30 AM Buenos Aires shift, including a 1\-hour lunch break.
* Able to start within two weeks.


**Why Join**
* Work 100% remotely with a global, collaborative team.
* Contribute to innovative projects and make a real impact.
* Join a fast\-growing company with strong values and room to grow.
* Paid time off (PTO) and all Argentine national holidays off.
* Company\-provided laptop and equipment to set you up for success.

title: Backend Developer (Kotlin / AWS / TypeScript/Android)
description:
**Summary** 




 We’re looking for an experienced Android Developer to join our growing development team and take ownership of multiple existing Kotlin\-based mobile applications. The ideal candidate will be passionate about building reliable, scalable, and user\-friendly Android apps with an eye for clean architecture, maintainable code, and smooth user experiences.
 


* Full\-time, Permanent
* European timezone. B2/C1 Engish
* Location Restrictions:
 **European Union, Eastern Europe, Ukraine, Poland, Georgia, Armenia**



  





**About the Role** 




 Powered by patented technology, our platform combines advanced association methods with an AI learning engine to enable real\-time media streaming at scale, without compromising guest privacy.
 



 The platform uses AI to recognize individuals within crowded and dynamic environments such as amusement parks and events, allowing guests to simply upload a selfie to match it with media captured in real time. The platform automatically associates all relevant photos and videos with a user and delivers them directly to their device.
 



  





 We’re looking for an experienced
 **Android Developer** 
 to join our growing development team and take ownership of multiple existing Kotlin\-based mobile applications. The ideal candidate will be passionate about building reliable, scalable, and user\-friendly Android apps with an eye for clean architecture, maintainable code, and smooth user experiences.
 



  





 You’ll work closely with our product, backend, and devops teams to deliver features, resolve technical challenges, and modernize existing codebases. While the primary focus is
 **Kotlin** 
 development, experience with
 **AWS services** 
 ,
 **TypeScript (Node.js)** 
 , or
 **Java** 
 will be a strong advantage.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop, enhance, and maintain multiple existing Android applications written in
 **Kotlin** 
 .
* Refactor legacy components for performance, maintainability, and scalability.
* Collaborate with backend teams integrating RESTful APIs and AWS\-based services.
* Implement modern Android development best practices
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and release processes to ensure high code quality.
* Work with CI/CD pipelines for automated builds, testing, and deployments.
* Contribute to planning sessions, helping to define technical requirements and timelines.
* (Optional) Collaborate on backend development written in
 **TypeScript (Node.js)** 
 or
 **Java** 
 .



  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* **3\+ years** 
 of professional Android development experience.
* Strong proficiency in
 **Kotlin** 
 (with solid understanding of Android SDK, Jetpack libraries, and architecture components).
* Proven experience maintaining and improving existing apps across multiple projects.
* Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, asynchronous programming, and data persistence (SQLite, Realm, etc.).
* Knowledge of Android UI/UX standards and responsive design principles.
* Experience with version control (Git) and collaborative development workflows.



  





**Desirable / Nice\-to\-Have Skills** 



* Experience with
 **AWS services** 
 such as Cognito, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, or DynamoDB.
* Familiarity with
 **TypeScript (Node.js)** 
 for backend integrations.
* Experience with
 **Java** 
 for Android legacy modules or interoperability.
* Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tooling GitHub Actions.
* Exposure to analytics, push notifications.
* Experience with testing frameworks (JUnit, Espresso, MockK, etc.).

title: IT-Systemadministrator (m/w/d)
description:
Als familiengeführtes und mittelständisches Unternehmen, mit mehr als 60 Jahren Erfahrung, haben wir uns auf die Entwicklung und Fertigung von Systemlösungen für die professionelle Reinigungs\- und Hygienetechnik Made in Germany spezialisiert.
   

  

 Für unsere wachsende R\+M / Suttner Unternehmensgruppe mit insgesamt 280 Mitarbeitern, flachen Hierarchien und kurzen Dienstwegen suchen wir für unser Unternehmen R\+M de Wit GmbH am Standort Heiligenhaus ab sofort einen
   

  

 IT\-Systemadministrator (m/w/d)
   

  

 (40 Stunden/Woche)
   

  

 Aufgaben – anspruchsvoll und vielseitig
   

  

* Administration, Überwachung und Wartung unserer Windows\- und Linux\-Serverlandschaft
* Betreuung und Weiterentwicklung der Netzwerkinfrastruktur (Switches, Firewalls, VPN)
* Installation und Wartung der Datenbank\-Server sowie Datenimport und \-export über diverse Schnittstellen
* Verwaltung von Benutzerkonten, Gruppenrichtlinien und Berechtigungen (Active Directory, Microsoft 365\)
* Sicherstellung des IT\-Betriebs, der Systemverfügbarkeit, der IT\-Sicherheit sowie Durchführung von Backups und Systemupdates
* IT\-Support für unsere Mitarbeitenden (1st und 2nd Level)
* Mitarbeit an IT\-Projekten und kontinuierliche Optimierung bestehender Systeme


 Profil – motiviert und interessiert
   

  

* Abgeschlossene Berufsausbildung im IT\-Bereich und erste Berufserfahrungen in einer vergleichbaren Position \- alternativ sind auch Quereinsteiger mit entsprechender Berufserfahrung und Lernbereitschaft herzlich willkommen
* Gute Kenntnisse in Windows und Linux\-Systemen
* Erfahrung mit Virtualisierungstechnologien (Hyper\-V)
* Erfahrung mit Cloud\-Technologien
* Fundierte Kenntnisse in den Anwendungsbereichen Active Directory, Microsoft 365, Exchange Server SE, SQL\-Datenbanken, Veeam
* Grundkenntnisse in WordPress sowie PHP zur Unterstützung interner Webanwendungen
* Gute Englischkenntnisse
* Selbstständige, strukturierte und lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise
* Teamplayer, der sich durch eine verantwortungsbewusste, zuverlässige und dienstleistungsorientierte Arbeitsweise auszeichnet

title: Analista de SOC (Security Operations Center)
description:
🟣 En Accenture Argentina buscamos profesionales apasionados por la innovación que quieran aprender y superarse día a día para sumarse a nuestros equipos de Technology 🟣
   

  

 🚀¿Querés formar parte de la transformación digital y ser parte de proyectos desafiantes e innovadores?
   

  

 Nuestros profesionales de la seguridad global ayudan a nuestros clientes a prepararse, proteger, detectar, responder y recuperarse en todos los puntos del ciclo de vida de la seguridad. Ya sea para defenderse de las amenazas conocidas en tiempo real o para detectar y responder a las desconocidas, proporcionamos un espectro completo de capacidades: desde el desarrollo de estrategias de seguridad, la transformación del negocio hasta los servicios de seguridad gestionados.
   

  

 📌
 **Qué Desafíos Te Esperan** 
 :
   

  

  

- Monitorear diversas alertas de seguridad que son gestionadas mediante una herramienta SIEM.

- Investigar e identificar sus posibles causas y consecuencias.

- Realizar triage y correlación de incidentes.

- Diferenciar constantemente que eventos pueden considerarse incidentes de seguridad y cuales corresponde a falsos positivos.

- Estar preparado para poder detectar cualquier tipo de actividad anómala antes que suceda.

- Complementar las investigaciones con Threat Intelligence

- Entender el comportamiento de malware, detectar su alcance/impacto en la red e identificar su posible remediación.

- Buscar proactivamente amenazas en la red.

- Identificar e implementar IOC.

- Ser capaz de recomendar y comunicar las mejores soluciones para solventar el incidente utilizando herramientas de ticketing.

- Buscar constantemente procesos de automatización.

- Desarrollar y mantener Playbooks relacionados al manejo de incidentes.

**Lo que te hará exitoso** 
 :
   

  

  

- \+2 años de experiencia en posiciones similares.

- Administración de soluciones SIEM

- Conocimientos sobre las diferentes plataformas y soluciones de seguridad, networking e infraestructura de IT.

- Gestión de incidentes.

- Gestión de vulnerabilidades

- Conocimientos básicos de Ethical Hacking

- Conocimiento de OT

- Conocimientos en scripting (Python, Powershell, Bash)

- Ingles Avanzado (excluyente)

- Cursos o participaciones de charlas afines

**Un lugar de trabajo único, descubrí los beneficios que tenemos para vos:**
 Creditos en Pedidos Ya
   

  

 Prepaga Swiss Medical
   

  

 Reintegro de Conectividad \& Servicios
   

  

 Gimnasio 100% Bonificado
   

  

 Semana extra de vacaciones
   

  

 Certificaciones bonificadas
   

  

 Día de cumpleaños libre
   

  

 Bonos
   

  

 ‍‍‍Licencias de Paternidad \& Maternidad Extendida
   

  

 Ayuda económica de guardería
   

  

 y muchos más!
   

  

**EN ACCENTURE, LA IGUALDAD IMPULSA LA INNOVACIÓN**
 ¿Sabías que Accenture fue elegida la compañía más diversa e inclusiva
   

  

 del mundo? Creemos que la fuerza laboral del futuro es una fuerza igualitaria para todos.
   

  

*Todas las decisiones referidas al proceso de selección de empleo se tomarán sin hacer distinción, exclusión o preferencia alguna basada en motivos de raza, color, género, orientación sexual, discapacidad, edad, religión, opinión política o sindical, nacionalidad u origen socioeconómico ni ninguna otra prevista en la legislación vigente, que tengan por efecto anular o alterar la igualdad de oportunidades o de trato entre los candidatos.*

title: Application Support Associate Engineer, Estimation
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Software Engineering
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Application Support Associate Engineer, Estimation**
 Argentina \| Latam
   

  

 Hybrid
   

  

****Job Details****
 Salesforce is seeking talented and motivated Software Engineers to join the Corporate Strategy – Hyperscalers organization, helping to build the next generation of our Estimation\-as\-a\-Service (EaaS) platform — the API\-first foundation enabling Salesforce’s consumption\-based business model.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll collaborate with a cross\-functional team of engineers, product managers, and architects to design and build systems that directly influence how Salesforce estimates, prices, and delivers value to customers. You’ll work on real\-world problems at scale, learning from experienced mentors while contributing to impactful projects that support strategic growth across the company.
   

  

 If you’re passionate about clean code, modern architectures, and learning by doing, this is an opportunity to grow your skills in one of Salesforce’s most innovative engineering teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, implement, and maintain software components across all tiers: databases, APIs, business logic, integrations, and user experience.
* Collaborate with senior engineers and product leaders to build scalable, reliable, and secure systems.
* Participate in design discussions and contribute to technical decisions with a focus on performance, maintainability, and quality.
* Write clean, testable, and well\-documented code aligned with team standards.
* Support process automation and system integrations that improve efficiency and scalability.
* Contribute to code reviews, testing, and continuous delivery processes.
* Learn new technologies and frameworks, and proactively apply them to improve team productivity.
* Embrace a culture of curiosity, experimentation, and continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of professional software development experience (or equivalent combination of education and project experience).
* Strong programming fundamentals: OOP, data structures, algorithms, design patterns, and concurrency.
* Proficiency in at least one backend language such as TypeScript/Node.js, Java, Go, or Python.
* Familiarity with REST APIs, microservices, and relational databases (PostgreSQL or similar).
* Understanding of version control (Git) and CI/CD practices.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Clear communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively in agile teams.
* Growth mindset — eagerness to learn, iterate, and contribute to shared goals.


**Preferred Skills (Non\-Exclusive)**
* Experience with frontend frameworks (React, Angular, or similar).
* Exposure to API design and integration patterns.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
* Experience working in agile environments with short release cycles.
* Interest in consumption\-based models, pricing systems, or data\-driven architectures.


****Success Indicators****
* Delivery of well\-structured, maintainable code that meets business and performance requirements.
* Active participation in team discussions, reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Demonstrated learning and growth through increasing ownership and technical contribution.
* Collaboration and support across teams to achieve shared goals.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you require assistance due to a disability applying for open positions please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: React Developer
description:
Greencode Software is a Software Factory born in 2015 and constantly searching for new challenges.
   

  

 Based in Buenos Aires and the United States, it’s a growing team that, guided through the principle of
 **collaboration** 
 , seeks to position itself as a technical and technological reference in digital transformation innovatively providing solutions to companies.
   

  

**Continuous learning** 
 is one of our core values. We see obstacles as opportunities to overcome ourselves.
   

  

 Are you ready to join a collaborative, flexible, and resilient team that carries agility in its DNA?
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **React Developer** 
 to join us!
   

  

**WHAT CHALLENGES SHOULD YOU EXPECT?**
* Helping customers develop scalable applications with rich user experiences.
* Working as a technical leader alongside customer business, development, and infrastructure teams.
* Providing deep software development knowledge concerning front\-end architecture, UX/UI design, and programming.
* Advising and implementing AWS best practices.
* Developing UIs using frameworks such as React.js and Next.js.
* Define structure, style guides, and code standards for a project.
* Define CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Github actions.


**WHAT WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED?**
* Good understanding of JavaScript.
* Strong experience using React.
* Exposure to Front\-end libraries/frameworks \- primarily for React.
* Knowledge of scrum methodologies.
* Experience using Next.js technologies.
* Experience using React Native.
* Experience with Material UI.
* Experience using JIRA/Confluence.
* Experience with web performance optimization.
* Experience building scalable front\-end infrastructure software or distributed systems.
* Demonstrated leadership abilities in an engineering environment in driving operational excellence and best practices.
* Able to solve difficult software and UX problems with some ambiguity.
* Pushes for information to avoid solving the wrong problem and mitigate UI risks early in the process to avoid feature delays.
* Can decompose a problem into clear software and UX design actions.
* Can articulate the risks and benefits of depending on front\-end libraries, frameworks, and tools\-set.


**WHY CHOOSING US?**
* Agile and flexible environment.
* A highly competitive compensation.
* Plenty of opportunities to learn and develop your career
* A supportive yet challenging group of people who want to deliver world\-class solutions to our clients.
* Flexible working hours.
* Flexibility to do home office.

title: Process Engineer HC - Planta Tortuguitas
description:
**¿QUIÉNES SOMOS?**
 ¿Quieres ser parte de una compañía que hace la diferencia alrededor del mundo? En Unilever, tenemos un propósito claro \- Iluminar la vida diaria de las personas a través de sus productos y servicios, así como también promover un estilo de vida sustentable \-. A través de nuestras 400 marcas que llegan a 2\.5 mil millones de personas todos los días, nuestro objetivo es generar un impacto social positivo a nivel mundial y local.
   

  

 Estamos buscando un/a
 **Ingeniero/a de Procesos** 
 para el área de Producción en nuestra unidad de negocio de
 **Home Care.**
**Los Objetivos Principales Serán**
 Liderar y dar soporte a los procesos productivos de la Planta Tortuguitas, impulsando la optimización, eficiencia, calidad y sustentabilidad de las operaciones, mediante la aplicación de metodologías de mejora continua y la implementación de nuevas tecnologías.
   

  

**Las Principales Responsabilidades Serán**
* Análisis y resolución de las perdidas crónicas de las líneas/procesos
* Analizar y resolver desvíos crónicos de calidad
* Participar del análisis e implementación de proyectos del Master Plan de planta.
* Realizar y mantener actualizados los calendarios AM de las líneas.
* Desarrolla e implementar Kaizenes
* Aplicar la metodología UMS en todas las actividades.
* Planificar y priorizar las acciones a realizar en las paradas planeadas


**¿QUÉ NECESITAS PARA APLICAR A LA VACANTE?**
* Graduados o próximos a graduarse de carreras de ingeniería.
* Experiencia previa en posiciones de producción u operativas.
* Excelentes habilidades de relacionamiento y comunicación con clientes internos y externos.
* Inglés: Avanzado


 En Unilever, queremos generar experiencias que transformen a las personas. Es por eso que buscamos potenciar la flexibilidad, la agilidad, el bienestar y la diversidad. Estos son algunos beneficios y la cultura que te esperan
   

  

* Modelo híbrido de trabajo.
* Días adicionales de vacaciones.
* Viernes Flex.
* Día de cumpleaños flex.
* Caja de productos bimestral.
* Descuentos en becas de grado y posgrado, cursos cortos e idiomas.
* Posibilidad de participar del programa de acciones.
* Y mucho más!


 Unilever is an organisation committed to equity, inclusion and diversity to drive our business results and create a better future, every day, for our diverse employees, global consumers, partners, and communities. We believe a diverse workforce allows us to match our growth ambitions and drive inclusion across the business. At Unilever we are interested in every individual bringing their ‘Whole Self’ to work and this includes you! Thus if you require any support or access requirements, we encourage you to advise us at the time of your application so that we can support you through your recruitment journey.

title: Remote Wastewater Electrical Engineer
description:
We are an expanding engineering consultancy focused on electrical design for wastewater and stormwater lift stations. We are seeking an experienced engineer to lead projects, guide a small drafting team, and support our growth into areas like treatment plant design.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with civil engineers, city officials, and equipment vendors to define project requirements.
* Oversee and review the work of a drafting team, and update plans when necessary.
* Work closely with Professional Engineers (PEs) to review and approve designs.
* Monitor project progress, communicate updates to clients, and ensure deadlines are met.
* Review submittals during bidding and construction phases.
* (Optional) Contribute to expanding services into treatment plant projects and help standardize drafting procedures and CAD templates


**Requirements**
* Hands\-on experience in wastewater electrical engineering (lift stations, pump stations, or treatment plants).
* Previous experience working for the U.S Market in this same indsutry will be highly valued
* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
* Strong AutoCAD skills, with experience reviewing and checking drafting work.
* Experience managing or coordinating projects with multiple stakeholders.
* Knowledge of Autodesk Vault or similar project management software is a plus.
* Broader experience in MEP disciplines (mechanical, civil, etc.) is an advantage


**Benefits**
* Take a leadership role in a growing consultancy.
* Work on innovative wastewater and stormwater projects.
* Collaborative environment with opportunities to expand your expertise into new project types
* Work from anywhere!

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
We are searching for an experienced
 **Cloud Engineer** 
 with strong expertise in cloud database architectures to join our team.
 



 In this position, you will be tasked with ensuring the scalability, security, and performance of cloud\-based solutions within critical production environments. You will work collaboratively across teams to design and implement innovative cloud solutions.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Architect, implement, and manage reliable and optimized cloud databases using systems like Amazon RDS, DynamoDB, ElastiCache, and Azure SQL Database
* Collaborate with development, infrastructure, and operations teams to deliver scalable and secure solutions
* Improve database performance by optimizing SQL queries, PLSQL processes, and Bash scripts
* Diagnose and resolve issues related to performance and availability in complex production systems
* Oversee security and access management using tools such as Vault and BeyondTrust while monitoring systems with platforms like Datadog and CloudWatch
* Automate infrastructure and workflows using Terraform, Terragrunt, Ansible, and GitLab



  
 



**Requirements** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related discipline
* At least 2 years of experience in cloud engineering roles
* In\-depth knowledge of Amazon RDS, including configuration and optimization techniques
* Practical experience managing DynamoDB for non\-relational databases
* Proficiency in ElastiCache for enhancing performance and caching solutions
* Experience with Azure SQL Database for managing scalable relational databases in the cloud
* Advanced expertise in database design, modeling, query optimization, and scalability best practices
* Familiarity with monitoring tools like CloudWatch and Datadog to ensure system reliability
* Strong experience in automating infrastructure using tools such as Terraform and Ansible
* Skilled in using task management and tracking tools like Jira
* Proven ability to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional technical teams
* Fluent English communication skills, written and spoken, at a B2 level or higher



  
 



**Nice to have** 



* Experience working with additional database engines and cloud services beyond the listed tools
* Knowledge of containerization technologies, including Docker and Kubernetes
* Understanding of advanced security practices for cloud\-based systems
* Certifications in AWS, Azure, or other cloud platforms



  
 



**We offer** 



* International projects with top brands
* Work with global teams of highly skilled, diverse peers
* Healthcare benefits
* Employee financial programs
* Paid time off and sick leave
* Upskilling, reskilling and certification courses
* Unlimited access to the LinkedIn Learning library and 22,000\+ courses
* Global career opportunities
* Volunteer and community involvement opportunities
* EPAM Employee Groups
* Award\-winning culture recognized by Glassdoor, Newsweek and LinkedIn

title: Support Engineer - Argentina
description:
AppsFlyer helps brands make good choices for their business and their customers with its advanced measurement, data analytics, deep linking, engagement, fraud protection, data clean room, and privacy\-preserving technologies. Built on the idea that brands can increase customer privacy while providing exceptional experiences, AppsFlyer empowers thousands of creators and 10,000\+ technology partners to create better, more meaningful customer relationships.
   

  

 We’re looking for a technically savvy person who understands the importance of customer\-oriented and responsive support services. We believe that we’re successful only when our customers thrive. The right talent will be a natural problem\-solver and a strong communicator. This individual would also work closely with AppsFlyer’s R\&D, Customer Success and Product Teams. This individual will also impact the product's evolution by providing feedback that can be integrated into future product development.
   

  

 Please submit your CV in English.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Take end\-to\-end ownership of customer technical issues, including initial troubleshooting, identification of root cause, and issue resolution and communication.
* Serve as point of contact on customer escalations and ensure customer issues are resolved meticulously.
* Work with AppsFlyer’s R\&D and product teams on escalations and product enhancement requests.
* Enrich our client Knowledge Base with relevant technical information.
* Create and lead support improvement processes across the company.
* Provide product feedback and insights to the business and R\&D teams.
* Manage various internal projects, such as: training, ensuring support readiness for new feature releases, etc.
* Being a technical poc for select VIP customers, working closely with the sales and business teams.


**What You Have**
* Passion for solving customer issues in a fast\-paced environment
* 2\+ years of experience with technical support / QA / data analysis/development/ technical account management
* Experience in SQL querying and analyzing data
* Business Proficiency in English
* Structured and process\-oriented
* Ability to learn new technologies quickly
* Ability to multitasking and work independently


**Bonus Points**
* Web/Mobile marketing and/or digital advertising experience
* Mobile development / testing (iOS, Android) experience
* Familiar with Big data technologies
* Familiar with working with different APIs


 As a global company operating from 25 offices across 19 countries, we reflect the human mosaic of the diverse and multicultural world in which we live. We ensure equal opportunities for all of our employees and promote the recruitment of diverse talents to our global teams without consideration of race, gender, culture, or sexual orientation. We value and encourage curiosity, diversity, and innovation from all our employees, customers, and partners.
   

  

 “As a Customer Obsessed company, we must first be Employee Obsessed. We need to make sure that we provide the team with the tools and resources they need to go All\-In.” Oren Kaniel, CEO

description:
Estamos en búsqueda de
 **Devs PHP (Semi Senior y/o Senior)** 
 que resida en
 **CABA o alrededores** 
 , sin inglés, para sumarse a una Fintech nacional en pleno crecimiento!

 (

 presencial)

title: Desarrollador de .NET
description:
En
 **Randstad Digital** 
 buscamos un/a
 **Desarrollador/a .NET Ssr/Sr** 
 para sumar a nuestro cliente.
 



  






 Contratación
 
 : Full\-time. Por tiempo indeterminado.
 




 Modalidad
 
 : Híbrida (2 días presenciales y 3 de home office). Oficinas ubicadas en Moreno.
 



  





**Responsabilidades** 
 :
 


* Participar en la creación y mantenimiento de aplicaciones y sistemas.
* Realizar tareas de mantenimiento en el código base, como realización de tests unitarios, correcciones de errores, optimización de rendimiento y actualizaciones de versiones.
* Identificar oportunidades para mejorar los procesos de desarrollo, la eficiencia del equipo y la calidad del código.
* Identificar y resolver problemas técnicos, ya sea en el código existente o en nuevas implementaciones, velando por la calidad del código.
* Asistir a reuniones de planificación, revisión de proyectos y otras reuniones relacionadas con el desarrollo para aportar ideas y dar actualizaciones sobre el progreso de los proyectos en curso.
* Trabajar en colaboración con otros desarrolladores, ya sea participando en reuniones de equipo, revisando el código de otros, brindando retroalimentación constructiva, etc.



  





**Requerimientos:** 



* Al menos entre tres o cuatro años de experiencia en el desarrollo de aplicaciones utilizando tecnologías y lenguajes relacionados con .NET.
* Conocimiento y experiencia utilizando bases de datos SQL Server.
* Curiosidad por interactuar con equipamiento físico y tecnologías propias de la industria (como RFID o PLCs).



  





*Si contás con la experiencia requerida y la propuesta es de tu interés, no dudes en postularte. ¡Te estamos esperando!*

title: Data Engineer ID43407
Full-Stack Developer (Spark/Scala)
description:
**Talan – Positive Innovation**
 Talan is an international consulting group specializing in innovation and business transformation through technology. With over 7,200 consultants in 21 countries and a turnover of €850M, we are committed to delivering impactful, future\-ready solutions.
   

  

**Talan at a Glance**
 Headquartered in Paris and operating globally, Talan combines technology, innovation, and empowerment to deliver measurable results for our clients. Over the past 22 years, we’ve built a strong presence in the IT and consulting landscape, and we’re on track to reach €1 billion in revenue this year.
   

  

**Our Core Areas of Expertise**
* **Data \& Technologies:** 
 We design and implement large\-scale, end\-to\-end architecture and data solutions, including data integration, data science, visualization, Big Data, AI, and Generative AI.
* **Cloud \& Application Services:** 
 We integrate leading platforms such as SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, Microsoft, AWS, and IBM Maximo, helping clients transition to the cloud and improve operational efficiency.
* **Management \& Innovation Consulting:** 
 We lead business and digital transformation initiatives through project and change management best practices (PM, PMO, Agile, Scrum, Product Ownership), and support domains such as Supply Chain, Cybersecurity, and ESG/Low\-Carbon strategies.


**We work with major global clients across diverse sectors, including Transport \& Logistics, Financial Services, Energy \& Utilities, Retail, and Media \& Telecommunications.**
**Job Description**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable
 **backend services** 
 using
 **Spark and Scala** 
 .
* Implement and optimize
 **Spring Boot** 
 applications.
* Collaborate with frontend teams to ensure seamless integration with
 **Angular/React** 
 applications.
* Work within a
 **microservices architecture** 
 , ensuring modular and high\-performance solutions.
* Ensure
 **code quality and security** 
 by utilizing tools like
 **Sonar and Fortify** 
 , and resolving detected vulnerabilities.
* Implement
 **unit tests** 
 using
 **JUnit, Jasmine, or Karma** 
 to maintain high code reliability.
* Participate actively in
 **Agile methodologies** 
 (Scrum or Kanban) to ensure efficient development cycles.


**Qualifications**
**What are we looking for?**
* **2\+ years of experience** 
 as a backend developer.
* Strong proficiency in
 **Spark and Scala** 
 .
* Advanced knowledge of
 **Spring Boot** 
 .
* Working knowledge of
 **Angular or React** 
 .
* Experience with
 **microservices architecture** 
 .
* Familiarity with
 **Sonar and/or Fortify** 
 for code analysis and security issue resolution.
* Hands\-on experience in writing and executing
 **unit tests** 
 (JUnit, Jasmine, Karma).
* Experience working in
 **Agile environments** 
 (Scrum or Kanban).


**Additional Information**
**What do we offer you?**
* Full\-time contract.
* Smart Office Pack so that you can work comfortably from home.
* Training and career development.
* Benefits and perks such as
 **private medical insurance** 
 , life insurance.
